titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَيَقْتُلُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The man falls upon the man so he kills him

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَيَقْتُلُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The man falls upon the man so he kills him

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ وَقَعَ عَلَى رَجُلٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ وَقَعَ عَلَى رَجُلٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who falls upon a man, so he kills him, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is nothing upon him’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who falls upon a man, so he kills him, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is nothing upon him’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَيَقْتُلُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The man falls upon the man so he kills him

segments: رَجُلٍ دَفَعَ رَجُلًا عَلَى رَجُلٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ الدِّيَةُ عَلَى الَّذِي وَقَعَ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَقَتَلَهُ لِأَوْلِيَاءِ الْمَقْتُولِ قَالَ وَ يَرْجِعُ الْمَدْفُوعُ بِالدِّيَةِ عَلَى الَّذِي دَفَعَهُ قَالَ وَ إِنْ أَصَابَ الْمَدْفُوعَ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَهُوَ عَلَى الدَّافِعِ أَيْضاً .
arabic.text: رَجُلٍ دَفَعَ رَجُلًا عَلَى رَجُلٍ فَقَتَلَهُ فَقَالَ الدِّيَةُ عَلَى الَّذِي وَقَعَ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَقَتَلَهُ لِأَوْلِيَاءِ الْمَقْتُولِ قَالَ وَ يَرْجِعُ الْمَدْفُوعُ بِالدِّيَةِ عَلَى الَّذِي دَفَعَهُ قَالَ وَ إِنْ أَصَابَ الْمَدْفُوعَ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَهُوَ عَلَى الدَّافِعِ أَيْضاً .

segments: Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib and Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who pushed a man upon another man, so he got killed (by) him. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wergild is upon the one who fell upon the man who got killed, for the guardians of the killed one’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And the pushed one can demand the wergild from the one who pushed him (at the first place)’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But if the pushed-one was also hit by anything (so got injured), so it would be upon the pusher (to compensate) him as well’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib and Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who pushed a man upon another man, so he got killed (by) him. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wergild is upon the one who fell upon the man who got killed, for the guardians of the killed one’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And the pushed one can demand the wergild from the one who pushed him (at the first place)’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But if the pushed-one was also hit by anything (so got injured), so it would be upon the pusher (to compensate) him as well’.

narratorChain.raw: ابْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ رِئَابٍ وَ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَقَعُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ فَيَقْتُلُهُ
titles.en: Chapter 11 – The man falls upon the man so he kills him

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ وَقَعَ عَلَى رَجُلٍ مِنْ فَوْقِ الْبَيْتِ فَمَاتَ أَحَدُهُمَا فَقَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْأَعْلَى شَيْ‏ءٌ وَ عَلَى الْأَسْفَلِ شَيْ‏ءٌ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ وَقَعَ عَلَى رَجُلٍ مِنْ فَوْقِ الْبَيْتِ فَمَاتَ أَحَدُهُمَا فَقَالَ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْأَعْلَى شَيْ‏ءٌ وَ عَلَى الْأَسْفَلِ شَيْ‏ءٌ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Aban Bin Usman, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who fell upon a man from the top of the house, so one of the two died. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is not upon the higher one, anything, and there is not upon the lower one, anything’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Aban Bin Usman, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a man who fell upon a man from the top of the house, so one of the two died. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is not upon the higher one, anything, and there is not upon the lower one, anything’.

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْوَشَّاءِ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ قَالَ
